instruction: Configure drizzle-kit correctly and use current migration commands
relevant_when: Agent sets up drizzle-kit configuration or writes migration commands
context: drizzle.config.ts must use 'dialect' (not the removed 'driver' field) and defineConfig() from 'drizzle-kit'. Migration commands are 'npx drizzle-kit generate' and 'npx drizzle-kit migrate' -- the old ':dialect' suffix syntax (generate:sqlite, push:postgresql) was removed. The config needs schema path, out directory, dialect, and dbCredentials. Migration files must be committed to git. Pass { schema } to drizzle() to enable the query API. SQLite requires foreign_keys=ON pragma.

checklist.name: dialect-not-driver
checklist.rule: drizzle.config.ts uses the 'dialect' field ('sqlite' | 'postgresql' | 'mysql'), not the removed 'driver' field

checklist.name: define-config-used
checklist.rule: drizzle.config.ts imports and uses defineConfig() from 'drizzle-kit' for type-safe configuration

checklist.name: schema-path-configured
checklist.rule: drizzle.config.ts sets the 'schema' field pointing to the schema file (e.g., './src/db/schema.ts')

checklist.name: out-directory-configured
checklist.rule: drizzle.config.ts sets the 'out' field for migration output directory (e.g., './drizzle')

checklist.name: db-credentials-configured
checklist.rule: drizzle.config.ts includes a dbCredentials object with connection info

checklist.name: generate-command-current
checklist.rule: Uses 'npx drizzle-kit generate' (not the old 'generate:sqlite' or 'generate:pg' dialect-suffixed syntax)

checklist.name: migrate-command-current
checklist.rule: Uses 'npx drizzle-kit migrate' to apply migrations (not 'push' for production, not old dialect-suffixed syntax)

checklist.name: migrations-committed-to-git
checklist.rule: Documentation or notes mention that migration files should be committed to version control
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes migration guides or setup documentation

checklist.name: schema-passed-to-drizzle
checklist.rule: When creating the drizzle instance, passes { schema } as the second argument: drizzle(client, { schema }) to enable the query API
checklist.relevant_when: Agent sets up the Drizzle database connection

checklist.name: sqlite-foreign-keys-pragma
checklist.rule: For SQLite, enables foreign_keys=ON pragma since SQLite has foreign key enforcement OFF by default
checklist.relevant_when: Agent sets up a SQLite database connection with Drizzle
